SIX FIGURE EMAIL # 4 

The “Spoiler Alert”



Ry Schwartz

2020



SIX FIGURE EMAIL # 4

About This Template:

Why we use it

3 Keys to an Effective “Future Pace”

What we’re “coaching”

Where to use it:

How to Use It:

Exploratory Questions

7 Things You Can Future Pace:

Template

See it in action:

Example 1: Sales Training for Coaches

Template (Version 2 - Contrast Realities)





About This Template: 

This template is designed to leverage the persuasive power of future pacing, and to use it in a compelly and concentrated way to not only show our prospect what it will be like to experience the benefits of our product, but also to future pace the experience of overcoming their resistance to purchasing it.



In doing so, we acknowledge that those elements of resistance are normal, par for the course, and ultimately overcomeable within the context of a new reality they want to experience.  

Why we use it

So often in a launch or evergreen sequence, we focus our lens on the prospect’s past while our prospect focuses on the present anxiety around the buying decision.



This email is a powerful reprieve to break that pattern and place themselves within the graduated step of owning the product.



3 Keys to an Effective “Future Pace”



Anchored in present and familiar context

Specific (don’t just draw the outline of the vision - but color it in for your prospect)

Authoritative (don’t speculate - dictate). 

What we’re “coaching”



The experience of owning our product (the desires it fulfills, the problems it overcomes, the new opportunities it opens them into, etc.) 



The experience of overcoming their present resistances to buying



Normalization of those resistances, and how it’s still consistent with the behavior of someone who eventually purchases. 



Distancing from the unfavorable reality of NOT owning our product. 



Belief and trust in the possibility of achieving the outcomes



Where to use it:



I’ve traditionally used it as a final day email, but have recently experimented in sending it the evening before the last day so that our prospect goes to sleep with the future paced ideas imprinted on their mind.



How to Use It: 

Exploratory Questions



What are the very SPECIFIC thought patterns or layers of resistance they’ll have to overcome before hitting “purchase”? 



To the best of your ability, describe their current reality as accurately as you can (this will be used to anchor the future pace): 



What will their experience look like 12-72 hours after buying your product?*



What will their experience look like 12-72 hours after NOT buying your product? 



What will their experience look like a few weeks after buying your product? 



What will their experience look like a few weeks after NOT buying your product? 



*Note: For questions 3-6, you want to describe the experience from both a tangible level as well as a mental/emotional level. 



7 Things You Can Future Pace:



Immediate next action steps

Next few days

New worldviews, understandings, perspectives and perceptions

Accomplishments, achievements, and outcomes 

Reactions to circumstances (that contrast to their present reactions) 

How others (friends, family, employees, competitors, mentors, etc.) relate to them in a new, desirable way

Future decisions (getting to choose from a new palette of options). 



Template



[Being Specific, Anchor in Current Reality] 

[Immediate FP - 10 Minutes - Disarm Fear/Resistance in Purchase] 

[Short Term FP - 24 Hours - Immediate experience of owning product - disarm buyer’s remorse]  

[CTA 2] 

[Medium Term FP - 2-3 Days - Quick wins as it relates to a unique aspect of your offer]

[CTA 3]

[Long Term FP - 2-3 Weeks - a paradigm has shifted. Reality has flipped. What outcomes have started to become realized?] 

[CTA 4] 

[Long Term FP - 4-8 Weeks: Tangible ongoing and growing results that emerge from that new world] 

[CTA 5] 

[Future Pace - 10+ Weeks - What it’s like experiencing that new ultimate outcome - and the experiences it now affords them] 





See it in action: 

Example 1: Sales Training for Coaches 



Subject:

Spoiler Alert: (first name’s) next 8 weeks… 



Body:



Hope you’re not too attached to your current day-to-day reality, <first name>. 



Y’know:



>>> Refreshing facebook every 3 minutes to see if that “hot coaching lead” you PM’d last week read your message. (hint: he did… and he doesn’t care)



>>> Talking about your “earning potential” like it’s actually a bankable asset. (the in-laws ain’t buying it)



>>> Wondering how many more amazon best sellers and online courses you need to take before something magically shifts and you finally get a piece of this whole “Freedom” thing the internet’s been going ape sh*t over for the last 20 years. 



Something tells me you won’t miss any of these things.



Which is good… 



Cause after leading over 640 coaches, consultants and experts into TRUE freedom in their business, we’ve clued in on the exact “anatomy of transformation” that awaits you. 



So when you enroll in X...



Here’s what your next few weeks will look like:



Next 10 Minutes: 



The part of you that’s been getting these emails, skipping them in bed every morning, and freaking out over whether or not you’re ready to take the plunge will finally break through the soft shell of fear that’s been holding your back.



Sure, you’re totally at ease with the mandatory, 60-day “achieve record breaking revenue or we’ll rush your investment back” guarantee. 



But your decision to enroll cuts much deeper. 



Because this time… 



The stronger, more ambitious and growth-driven part of you wins.



So it’s with strong intention, reserved optimism and a 20-tonne bag of courage that you finally say:



K fine.Send me my login info so I can test it out and make a more informed FINAL decision



Tomorrow: 



You wake up feeling amazing.



Clear, focused, and excited to get to work.



Free from that stinging sense of ‘buyer’s remorse” that you’ve felt in the past when you intuitively knew you just “fell for another guru’s empty promise” or gave into your shiny object syndrome.



You feel free from all of that crap (and motivated beyond all hell) because you know that what you just got yourself into isn’t a just a single piece of a never-ending puzzle, but the: 



Entire A-Z Plan to getting your first 5-Figure/Month Funnel up and running.



And because you have EVERYTHING you need to achieve that result (and nothing that will abuse your already fragile schedule by making you sit through hours of fluff)...



You feel totally unstoppable as you brew yourself a cup of something awesome and dive headfirst into Module 1. 



Two Days from Now:



Feeling great about your initial surge of momentum, you cash-in on your complimentary 3 Month of the Platinum Mastermind Facebook group and introduce yourself.



Initially, you’re a little hesitant, but after a day or two of lurking you come to realize:



Holy Crap! These people aren’t the money-hungry a$$holes and soulless capitalists I thought they were.



They’re honest, hard-working coaches and consultants like me. 



Working their tails off, serving their clients in a powerful way, and just wanting to get rewarded in a way that makes sense. 



Congrats. 



You now have a group of friends to lean on, learn from, and who literally won’t let you fail.



Not to mention, a group of amazing people who’ll actually understand and empathize with what you’re going through so that you won’t have to spazz out on your spouse who just “doesn’t get it”.





Next Two Weeks:



You’ll have gone through the first two modules.



And at some point, you’ll catch yourself talking out loud:



“Wow, I can see where I’ve been going wrong this entire time. How I’ve been undervaluing myself, letting fear and imposter syndrome get in the way, and holding myself back from realizing my true earning potential and impact as a coach”.



You might be brought to tears.



(it tends to get emotional round’ here).



But after taking about 10 seconds to kick yourself for waiting all this time and enduring all that unnecessary struggle…



You’ll lace up your boots because you can finally see how this all works.



Your right-ticket offer.



Your positioning in the market place.



An intimate understanding of your audience.



And a rekindled WILL to serve them more powerfully and profitably than ever.



Yep. It’s been a wild 14 days and you’re only getting started ;-)



Next 4 Weeks:



You’re starting to have REAL conversations with real clients.



At first they were scary:



“Who am I to charge 3K, 5K, or even 10K for a high-ticket package”.



But then you get over it.



You’ve re-watched the mindset trainings over and over.



Practiced the effortless enrollment strategies in Module 2.



Drew inspiration and courage from other members of the group who are taking the leap, jumping on those calls, and getting results.



And now… 



You’re starting to get YES’S too!  



What you once feared most has now become the most invigorating part of your day!



And after implementing the traffic strategies, landing page, and video scripts we’ve walked you through in Module 4, you have a seemingly neverending supply of hyper-qualified, cash-in-hand clients clamoring to squeeze themselves into your already overpacked iCal.



(of course, you never book calls past 5pm. That’s sacred family time where you finally get to see what it means to disconnect and spend time with the fam-jam instead of cozying up to a flatlining Paypal dashboard). 



Exciting times.



Profitable times.



Game-Changing Times. 



Next 8 Weeks:



One high-ticket sale has led to another.



You’ve already achieved more this quarter than you did all of last year.



And the best part…



You’re seeing that these revenue numbers aren’t an anomaly, but a consistent, repeatable and growing number that you’ve EARNED.



You can tie your results back to the exact strategies that got you there.



Your self-confidence is through the roof.



You know, experientially, what it means to alchemize your “earning potential” into your “earned reality”...



And the best part is…



You’re proud of the path you took to get there.



10 weeks and beyond:



You just got back from your first vacay since leaving your corporate job. 



You know… the one you’ve been promising your family you’d take them on for the last 2 years.



The pale, silky sands in Maui are more beautiful than you and your family could’ve imagined.



But the margaritas left a little something more to be desired.



(apparently, in your now long forgotten days of financial struggle, you grew accustomed to over-saucing your cocktails).



All good now.



You’re back home.



And in a moment of overflowing joy and gratitude, you email us to schedule a call. 



You want to share your success story with thousands of other coaches and consultants, and inspire them to take the leap that you made just 8 weeks ago.



The leap that changed it all.



The leap you don’t want to hoard to yourself. 



(you’ve dropped the over-competitiveness and crippling envy).



The leap you thought you’d never make…



But in a moment of complete courage and commitment…



Decided..



There really was no other way.



(sign off) 



P.S. The rest of the story is yours to write, <first name>.



We’ll take you to the place where the impossible becomes possible.



Where you get to make decisions out of JOY and EXCITEMENT instead of anxiety around money, and a crippling dialogue of “how you’re going to make it all work”. 



Where you can truly master your life, and be present to all the other roles in your life you’ve put on the backburner.



And personally…



I can’t wait to see what you do from this new place of freedom



It’s a pleasure to take you there..



Just promise to keep us posted



Example 2 - Contrast Realities



From 10X Landing Pages Launch
